name: Year A — Feb 18, 2026 (Wed)

antiphons.citation: Communion Antiphon • Option I | Cf. Ps 13 (12):6
antiphons.text:
I will sing to the Lord who has been bountiful with me,
sing psalms to the name of the Lord Most High.

planningNotes: Communion Antiphon • Option II | Cf. Mt 28:20

Behold, I am with you always,
even to the end of the age, says the Lord.
